revenue_recognition.policy: IP licenses recognized as series of distinct services over time. Variable consideration (royalty fees) allocated to distinct services using prescribed allocation guidance. Fixed consideration (sales/COO fees) allocated based on estimated standalone selling prices. Revenue recognized using time as measure of progress.
revenue_recognition.royalty_fees: Recognized as services provided monthly, based on % of hotel gross room revenue
revenue_recognition.sales_coo_fees: Fixed, collected upfront, recognized over contract term (10-20 years)
revenue_recognition.termination_fees: Recognized when payment received (no further service; collection uncertain)
revenue_recognition.incentive_amortization: Consideration paid to incentivize hotel owners amortized over contract life including sole-option extensions, as reduction to royalty fees

franchise_contracts.policy: Capitalized as intangible assets. Amortized straight-line over estimated useful life (contract term, generally 10-20 years including sole-option extension periods). Amortization begins on hotel opening date or contract execution date, whichever is later.
franchise_contracts.impairment_policy: Evaluate for indicators; if present, compare expected undiscounted future cash flows to carrying value. If not recoverable, recognize loss for excess of carrying value over estimated fair value.

accounts_receivable.policy: Amounts due from hotel owners. Allowance for credit losses based on historical collection activity, nature of instrument, current and forecasted business conditions.

financing_receivables.policy: Loans to certain franchised hotel owners. Allowance for credit losses maintained.

franchise_deposits.policy: Application/initiation fees collected at application time. Recorded as current liability until non-refundable, then reclassified to deferred revenues. If not approved, refunded less processing fees.

deferred_revenues.policy: Non-refundable advance consideration reclassified from franchise deposits. Recognized over contract term.

fair_value_measurements.policy: Three-tier hierarchy (Level 1/2/3). Fair values of financial assets and liabilities estimated equal to carrying values as of Dec 31, 2024 and 2023.

income_taxes.policy: Disregarded entity for US income tax purposes. All taxable income included in Hilton Worldwide consolidated return. No US income tax provision.
income_taxes.foreign_taxes: Certain US territories require withholding on franchise licensing fees. Rates vary by jurisdiction. Franchisee responsible for withholding and remittance.

graduate_brand.amortization_method: Straight-line to depreciation and amortization expense
graduate_brand.funding: Payment made by Hilton affiliate; short-term note payable recorded, settled Feb 2024

parent_debt_guarantee.description: Unconditional and irrevocable guarantee of certain Hilton parent debt obligations maturing 2025-2033
parent_debt_guarantee.collateral: All assets and franchise contracts pledged

litigation.description: Various claims and lawsuits in ordinary course. Ultimate resolution not expected to have material adverse effect.

related_party_transactions.centralized_cash_management: Hilton's centralized system; not controlled by the entity
related_party_transactions.franchise_deposit_lockbox: Collected by Hilton affiliates, deposited in lockbox to which entity has no access
related_party_transactions.operator_agreement: Hilton affiliate entitled to reasonable fee; no compensation paid in 2022-2024
related_party_transactions.graduate_note: Short-term note payable for Graduate acquisition, settled Feb 2024 with interest
